title: Ability to export/import automations

posts.author: JSkarbek (Jean)
posts.cookedHtml:
Allow the ability to export Automations from one board, and import them into another board.
Reason: it is very time consuming if you
a) have a “template” with multiple Automations,
b) create new dashboards from this template
c) at a later date, determine there is a need to update the template automations.

Each dashboard then requires manual updates to the automations.
